title: Spatial Transcriptomics: Emerging Technologies in Tissue Gene Expression Profiling.
author: Robles-Remacho A Sanchez-Martin RM Diaz-Mochon JJ
content: S-EPMC10603609 PMC10603609 Spatial Transcriptomics: Emerging Technologies in Tissue Gene Expression Profiling. In this Perspective, we discuss the current status and advances in spatial transcriptomics technologies, which allow high-resolution mapping of gene expression in intact cell and tissue
